datasetTotals.description: computed totals across all rows in the sheet

totalProfit.description: sum of the Profit column across every row

totalUnitsSold.description: sum of the Units Sold column across every row

rowCount.description: number of data rows in the sheet (excluding the header)

governmentSegmentRows.description: one entry per data row whose Segment is exactly Government; exclude every other segment

grossMarginPct.description: gross margin percentage computed as (Sales - COGS) / Sales * 100, rounded to one decimal place

totalManufacturingCost.description: Manufacturing Price multiplied by Units Sold

priceEffectiveDate.description: the date the product's sale price became effective, only if the dataset has a dedicated price-effective-date column; the transaction Date column is not a price-effective date, so if no such column exists, null

mostProfitableProduct.description: the Product value of the single row with the highest Profit anywhere in the sheet
